name: Mueang Chai Nat retail and civic core
capture_notes: Primary urban demand node around municipal core, Lotus's, civic uses, hospital-side trips, and dense everyday city movement. Best fit for compact city charging or medium DC node.

name: Chai Nat Bird Park and city-east leisure band
capture_notes: Leisure and family destination catchment linking Bird Park traffic with the eastern city fringe. Better for destination-style charging than pure corridor stopover.

name: Manorom Asian Highway service band
capture_notes: Asian Highway roadside and district-service zone around Manorom / Tha Chanuan. Suitable for corridor-oriented DC charging with visible frontage and amenities.

name: Sapphaya / Chao Phraya Dam leisure-corridor node
capture_notes: Mixed local, leisure, and through-traffic activity around Chao Phraya Dam and the eastern district side. More useful as a secondary support zone than as the primary urban peak.

name: Sankhaburi south service node
capture_notes: Southern district service catchment with routine local errands and corridor movement. Useful to preserve south-province visibility without overstating city intensity.

name: Hankha western district node
capture_notes: Western district center for community demand and coverage planning. Keep weaker than Mueang / Manorom to avoid over-painting low-density areas.
